ModMetaData.name: LxC - Build Everywhere
ModMetaData.author: Lexxers (Original: John Midnight)
ModMetaData.description:
Allows building on terrain that normally doesn't support it: shallow water, chest-deep water, marsh, marshy soil, soft sand, and mud.
Adds Light, Medium, Heavy, and Diggable affordances to these terrain types so you can place structures, floors, and furniture on them.
Originally created by John Midnight. Updated for RimWorld 1.6 by Lexxers.
Uses XML patches for maximum mod compatibility.
